title: lechea intermedia var. juniperina
intro: Lechea intermedia var. juniperina, also known as the juniper lechea or juniper leachea, is a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lechea intermedia var. juniperina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lechea intermedia var. juniperina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
